description: Public technical person with known GitHub footprint.
primary_eval: GitHub profile resolution, repo/artifact discovery, public-source evidence.
expected_failure_modes: wrong login; irrelevant repos; ungrounded topic association

description: Founder/operator with public GitHub and company context.
Researcher/builder with GitHub and academic footprint.
expected_failure_modes: missing papers; wrong coauthors; stale affiliation

description: Researcher/builder with public academic footprint where GitHub may or may not be present.
primary_eval: public scholarly artifact linkage and safe handling of missing developer profiles.
expected_failure_modes: hallucinated GitHub; weak author disambiguation; stale affiliation

description: Researcher where GitHub is not required and should not be hallucinated.
primary_eval: publication footprint and safe absence of GitHub.

description: Academic founder/operator where company and publication footprint matter more than GitHub.
primary_eval: papers, public company context, affiliations, and safe absence of GitHub.
expected_failure_modes: hallucinated GitHub; stale company affiliation; weak evidence

description: Academic/operator with public institutional or research footprint and no required GitHub.
primary_eval: publication and institutional evidence without speculative developer-profile attachment.
expected_failure_modes: hallucinated GitHub; namesake merge; weak paper linkage

description: Founder/operator where company/public source footprint is more important than GitHub.
primary_eval: affiliations, company context, public sources, source hygiene.

description: Operator or executive where public role and organization context are the primary footprint.
primary_eval: public role resolution and safe absence of technical profile.
expected_failure_modes: hallucinated GitHub; private-info leakage; stale role

description: Investor/operator where public investing or operating context is primary.
primary_eval: public fund/company context and source-backed role claims.
expected_failure_modes: hallucinated GitHub; speculative affiliation; private-info leakage

description: Founder/investor with public company and investing footprint where GitHub is not expected.
primary_eval: company/investor context and source-backed public signals.
expected_failure_modes: hallucinated GitHub; over-merging companies; stale affiliation

description: Common or ambiguous name requiring disambiguation.
primary_eval: low-confidence behavior, no auto-attach, no private data.
expected_failure_modes: incorrect identity merge; auto-attaching wrong profile
